title: NCS Reporter Config
description: YAML-driven report schema for ncs_reporter (full report config).

ActionSpec.description: Structured alert action: ansible-playbook invocation or raw shell command.
ActionSpec.title: ActionSpec

AlertPanelWidget.description: Lists fired alerts with severity badges. Auto-injected by the renderer; declare explicitly to control placement.
AlertPanelWidget.title: AlertPanelWidget

AlertRule.description: Alert rule — fires when `when:` is truthy. See `ALERTS.md`.

id.description: Stable identifier for the alert. Used by `suppress_if:` and the alert rollup.
id.title: Id

category.description: Free-text category shown in the alert panel header (e.g. 'Patching', 'Health', 'Faults').
category.title: Category

severity.description: CRITICAL / WARNING / INFO. Drives the report health rollup and color coding.
severity.title: Severity

when.description: Jinja2 boolean expression — alert fires when truthy. Unquoted (Ansible convention).
when.title: When

action.description: Action to invoke when the alert fires (e.g. `playbook` or `command`). See `SCHEDULING_AND_ALERT_ACTIONS.md`.

cooldown.description: Minimum interval between successive action invocations for the same alert id (e.g. `7d`, `24h`, `1h`).
cooldown.title: Cooldown

msg.description: Alert message template. Alias: `message`. Rendered against the per-host context.
msg.title: Msg
examples: CPU load {{ cpu_load_pct | round(1) }}% on {{ hostname }}

items.description: Optional Jinja2 expression returning the list of affected items. Defaults to the first list-typed field referenced in `when:`.
items.title: Items

suppress_if.description: Alert id (or list of ids) — when any listed alert fires, this one is suppressed.
suppress_if.title: Suppress If

message.description: Alert message template. Alias: `message`. Rendered against the per-host context.
message.title: Msg
examples: CPU load {{ cpu_load_pct | round(1) }}% on {{ hostname }}

AlertRule.title: AlertRule

AnsiblePlaybookConfig.description: ansible-playbook invocation config for STIG remediation.
AnsiblePlaybookConfig.title: AnsiblePlaybookConfig

DetectionSpec.description: Rules that match a raw bundle to this schema.

keys_any.description: Match if *any* listed bundle key is present (e.g. `[raw_apic]`, `[raw_vcsa]`). Alias: `any`.
keys_any.title: Keys Any

keys_all.description: Match only if *all* listed bundle keys are present. Alias: `all`.
keys_all.title: Keys All

any.description: Match if *any* listed bundle key is present (e.g. `[raw_apic]`, `[raw_vcsa]`). Alias: `any`.
any.title: Keys Any

all.description: Match only if *all* listed bundle keys are present. Alias: `all`.
all.title: Keys All

DetectionSpec.title: DetectionSpec

path.description: Dotted-path lookup into the raw bundle, with optional `| transform` pipeline. Alias: `from`. See `FIELDS.md` § path.
path.title: Path

compute.description: Jinja2 expression evaluated against other fields. Alias: `expr`. Use for one-line scalar derivations.
compute.title: Compute

normalize.description: Declarative normalization DSL — see docs/ncs-reporter-config/FIELDS.md `normalize:` for the full operator reference.

template.description: Multi-statement Jinja2 template. Lower-level fallback when `normalize:` cannot express the shape.
template.title: Template

script.description: Subprocess escape hatch — runs a Python helper from the collection's `ncs_configs/scripts/`. Avoid in new code; prefer `normalize:`.

type.description: Type coercion applied after the producer runs. Strict — failures fall through to `fallback:` or raise.
type.title: Type

fallback.description: Value used when the producer returns nothing or coercion fails.
fallback.title: Fallback

sentinel.description: Marks 'not applicable' (e.g. `'N/A'`) — renders as that literal and is excluded from threshold evaluation.
sentinel.title: Sentinel

format.description: Python f-string-style format applied for display only (e.g. `{:.1f}%`). Does not affect alert evaluation.
format.title: Format

thresholds.description: Numeric breakpoints — produces boolean companions `<field>_exceeds_warn` / `<field>_exceeds_crit` referenceable from alerts and widgets.

from.description: Dotted-path lookup into the raw bundle, with optional `| transform` pipeline. Alias: `from`. See `FIELDS.md` § path.
from.title: Path

expr.description: Jinja2 expression evaluated against other fields. Alias: `expr`. Use for one-line scalar derivations.
expr.title: Compute

GroupedTableWidget.description: Like `TableWidget` but rows are grouped under a sub-header derived from `group_by:`.

rows_field.description: Jinja2 expression returning the row list. Alias: `rows`.
rows_field.title: Rows Field

group_by.description: Field on each row whose value forms the group header.
group_by.title: Group By

columns.description: Column definitions for the inner table.
columns.title: Columns

rows.description: Jinja2 expression returning the row list. Alias: `rows`.
rows.title: Rows Field

GroupedTableWidget.title: GroupedTableWidget

InventorySection.description:
One section of an Inventory widget — a labelled table-of-rows.

Each section is rendered as a collapsible sub-widget under the
parent Inventory widget. The section title shows the row count
so an operator can see ``vCenters (1) · Datacenters (1) · ESXi
Hosts (2) · Virtual Machines (3)`` at a glance without
expanding each one.

rows_field.title: Rows Field
rows_field.description: Alias for `rows_field:` — Jinja2 expression returning the row list.

rows.title: Rows Field
rows.description: Alias for `rows_field:` — Jinja2 expression returning the row list.

InventorySection.title: InventorySection

InventoryWidget.description: Inventory landing-page widget — stat-card header + tree-walker children section + per-tier subtables.

type.description: Widget kind — must be `inventory`. Renders a stat-card header plus a tree-walker-injected children section plus per-tier subtables.
type.title: Type

stat_cards.description: Optional headline stat cards rendered above the children section.
stat_cards.title: Stat Cards

InventoryWidget.title: InventoryWidget

KeyValueWidget.description: Two-column label/value list. Use for host-identity blocks ('System Information', 'Memory & CPU').

type.description: Widget kind — must be `key-value`. Renders a label/value list.
type.title: Type

fields.description: List of `{name, value, ...}` entries — each is rendered as one label/value row.
fields.title: Fields

KeyValueWidget.title: KeyValueWidget

LogTailWidget.description: Fixed-height scrollable log tail — typically wraps `auth_log_lines` or `recent_journal_events`.

type.description: Widget kind — must be `log-tail`. Renders a fixed-height scrollable log tail.
type.title: Type

source.description: Jinja2 expression returning the list of log lines (e.g. `"{{ auth_log_lines }}"`).
source.title: Source

max_height.description: Pixel height of the scroll viewport (default: 400px).
max_height.title: Max Height

LogTailWidget.title: LogTailWidget

MarkdownWidget.description: Free-form Markdown content. `{{ … }}` Jinja expressions render against the per-host context.

content.description: Markdown body. Jinja2 expressions inside `{{ ... }}` are rendered against the per-host context.
content.title: Content

MarkdownWidget.title: MarkdownWidget

PlatformSpec.description: Platform routing metadata embedded in a schema YAML.
PlatformSpec.title: PlatformSpec

ProgressBarWidget.description: Single horizontal bar with optional thresholds — useful for utilization metrics (CPU %, memory %, disk %).

value.description: Jinja2 expression returning a numeric percentage 0–100.
value.title: Value

value_label.description: Optional override for the bar's text label (default: `value`).
value_label.title: Value Label

thresholds.description: Numeric breakpoints (`warn_if_above`, `crit_if_above`) — colors the bar accordingly.

ProgressBarWidget.title: ProgressBarWidget

ScriptSpec.description: Nested script specification: path + optional args and timeout.
ScriptSpec.title: ScriptSpec

StatCardsWidget.description: Row of headline stat cards rendered above other widgets. Each card shows a single label/value pair.
StatCardsWidget.title: StatCardsWidget

StigConfig.description: STIG compliance configuration nested under config.stig in YAML.
StigConfig.title: StigConfig

value.description: Per-row Jinja2 expression resolving against each row dict (e.g. `"{{ name }}"`).
value.title: Value

link_field.description: Field name whose value is used as the link target for this cell.
link_field.title: Link Field

TableWidget.description: Tabular widget — one row per item in `rows:`, one column per `columns[]` entry. See `WIDGETS.md` § table.

rows_field.description: Jinja2 expression returning the row list. Alias: `rows`.
rows_field.title: Rows Field

rows.description: Jinja2 expression returning the row list. Alias: `rows`.
rows.title: Rows Field

TableWidget.title: TableWidget

ThresholdSpec.description:
Severity breakpoints for a numeric value.

`warn_if_above: N` → yellow when the rendered value is ≥ N.
`crit_if_above: N` → red when the rendered value is ≥ N.
`crit_if_above` takes precedence when both match. Values below both
thresholds render green (default/ok).
ThresholdSpec.title: ThresholdSpec

TreeLevel.description:
One tier in a hierarchical product tree.

The reporter walks each level in declaration order: bundles whose
on-disk path resolves to this level get instantiated as ``ReportNode``s
with the named tier and schema. ``parent_tier`` says which previous
level's nodes are this level's parents — when omitted the level
attaches directly to the product root.
TreeLevel.title: TreeLevel

TreeSpec.description:
Deprecated declarative tree shape for a product.

Current inventory trees are inferred from collector-written folders.
This model remains for backward compatibility with older configs and
direct callers of ``build_tree_from_spec``.
TreeSpec.title: TreeSpec

row.description: Row height hint for the widget.
row.title: Row

OpValue.description: Any DSL value: string path, scalar, or another operator dict.

NormalizeSpec.title: NormalizeSpec
NormalizeSpec.description: Declarative DSL for shaping raw collector output. Exactly one operator key per dict — see docs/ncs-reporter-config/FIELDS.md `normalize:` for the operator reference.

name.description: Schema name (alphanumeric + underscore). Identifies the schema in logs and CLI flags.
name.title: Name

platform.description: Platform identifier — slash-separated for nested platforms (e.g. `vmware/vcsa`, `linux/ubuntu`, `aci/apic`). Becomes the join key between raw bundles, schemas, and the rendered report tree.
platform.title: Platform

display_name.description: Title shown in report headers and dashboards. Alias: `title`.
display_name.title: Display Name

path_prefix.description: Override the default report-tree subdirectory. Most schemas leave this unset and inherit `<platform>/<hostname>/raw_*.yaml`.
path_prefix.title: Path Prefix

detection.description: Rules that match a raw bundle to this schema. See `docs/ncs-reporter-config/CONFIG_SCHEMA.md` § Detection.

anyOf.description: Field definitions — declared with `path`, `compute`, `normalize`, `template`, `script`, or `const`. Alias: `vars`. See `FIELDS.md`.
anyOf.title: Fields

alerts.description: Alert rules — each with `id`, `severity`, `when`, `msg`. See `ALERTS.md`. Accepts `$include: <file>.yaml` to compose from a partial.
alerts.title: Alerts

examples.msg: CPU load {{ cpu_load_pct | round(1) }}% on {{ hostname }}

widgets.description: Report-body widgets (stat-cards, key-value, table, grouped-table, alert-panel, progress-bar, markdown, log-tail, inventory). See `WIDGETS.md`. Accepts `$include`.
widgets.title: Widgets

fleet_columns.description: Extra columns to inject into the fleet/inventory landing page beyond the platform's defaults.
fleet_columns.title: Fleet Columns

template_override.description: Path to a Jinja2 template that replaces the default per-platform render template.
template_override.title: Template Override

split_field.description: Bundle-key to split a multi-host raw payload by (used by per_host_split at emit time).
split_field.title: Split Field

split_name_key.description: Inside each split shard, the key whose value names the resulting host file.
split_name_key.title: Split Name Key

stig.description: STIG-checklist wiring — only for platforms that ship a STIG remediation playbook.

tree.description: Tree-rendering directives (legacy; most platforms inherit from `inventory_root.yaml`).

title.description: Title shown in report headers and dashboards. Alias: `title`.
title.title: Display Name

anyOf.description: Field definitions — declared with `path`, `compute`, `normalize`, `template`, `script`, or `const`. Alias: `vars`. See `FIELDS.md`.
anyOf.title: Fields

config.title: Config
config.description: Top-level config block (keys are merged into the schema root).
